designNotes.skillBaseline: Cold projectile, 3 hits base, 0.5 SPR per hit, 5s CD. Consumes Haunted: guaranteed crit on all 3 hits + 30% bonus damage. Consume bonus is the existing baseline mechanic in staff.ts.

buildIdentities.plague_doctor: Spirit Barrage as a debuff-applier — every projectile applies cold/poison stacks. Sustained AoE pressure when paired with Locust/Haunt.
buildIdentities.spirit_caller: Spirit Barrage manifests literal spirits — minions add extra projectiles, minion synergy. Pack-DPS playstyle.
buildIdentities.voodoo_master: Spirit Barrage as the crit-king burst skill — soul stacks add projectiles, crits cascade through the volley.

branches.theme: Each projectile carries plague — Spirit Barrage becomes a debuff distribution system.

nodes.name: Frostbite
nodes.description: Spirit Barrage hits have 20/40% chance to apply Chilled (1s).

nodes.name: Spirit Density
nodes.description: +15/30% Spirit Barrage damage.

nodes.name: Plague Burst
nodes.description: Each Spirit Barrage projectile applies 1 stack of Poisoned (3s).

nodes.name: Cold Compounding
nodes.description: +5/10% Spirit Barrage damage per debuff on target.

nodes.name: Plague Synergy
nodes.description: +20/40% Spirit Barrage damage on Plagued targets.

nodes.name: Crit Cold
nodes.description: Spirit Barrage critical strikes have 50/100% chance to apply Chilled (3s).

nodes.name: Cold Mastery
nodes.description: +10/20% cold penetration.

nodes.name: Spirit Pandemic
nodes.description: Spirit Barrage hits on Plagued targets transfer Plagued debuff to all enemies hit by this cast.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.spiritBarrageTransfersPlagued (NEW — staff.ts postCast for staff_spirit_barrage: if any hit target has plagued, apply plagued debuff to every other hit target with current snapshot)

nodes.name: DoT Support
nodes.description: +15/30% damage to DoT-tagged skills.

nodes.name: Frostbreaker
nodes.description: Spirit Barrage deals +75% damage to Chilled targets. Cost: −25% damage to non-chilled.
engineFields: conditionalMods.whileDebuffActive (EXISTS); rawBehaviors.spiritBarrageNonChilledPenalty (NEW — staff.ts preRoll: if target not chilled, multiply damageMult by (1 - value/100))

nodes.name: Eternal Cold
nodes.description: Each Spirit Barrage hit extends Chilled duration on the target by 1s (caps at 5s).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.spiritBarrageExtendsChilled (NEW — staff.ts postCast: per hit, add seconds to existing chilled debuff up to cap)

nodes.name: Stacking Salvo
nodes.description: Each projectile after the first applies an additional debuff stack (stacks Poisoned, Bleeding, or Chilled — whichever the target already has).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.spiritBarrageProjectileExtraStack (NEW — staff.ts postCast: for projectiles 2..N, if target has any stackable debuff, +1 stack)

nodes.name: THE WHISPER
nodes.description: Spirit Barrage applies Haunted (5s) on every hit AND its haunted-consume only consumes the combo state (debuff persists). Cost: −30% Spirit Barrage damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.spiritBarrageAppliesHaunted (NEW — staff.ts postCast: apply haunted debuff per hit); rawBehaviors.spiritBarrageConsumeKeepsHauntedDebuff (NEW — staff.ts preRoll: when consuming haunted comboState, do not strip target's haunted debuff); incDamage (EXISTS)

branches.theme: Each projectile is a spirit. The more dead you have at your side, the more shots you fire.

nodes.name: Extra Salvo
nodes.description: +1/2 extra Spirit Barrage projectiles.

nodes.name: Ghost Manifestation
nodes.description: Spirit Barrage critical strikes have 25/50% chance to summon a 3s spirit minion.

nodes.name: Phantasmal Echo
nodes.description: While 2+ minions are alive, Spirit Barrage hits create a small AoE burst at impact (10% of hit damage to 2 adjacent enemies).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.phantasmalEcho (NEW — staff.ts postCast: if minionCount >= minMinions, per hit emit AoE damage events to N pack neighbors at hitDamage * aoePercent/100)

nodes.name: Bound Power
nodes.description: +10/20% Spirit Barrage damage while any minion is alive.

nodes.name: Pack Hunter
nodes.description: +20/40% crit chance while 2+ minions alive.

nodes.name: Echoing Volley
nodes.description: On Spirit Barrage cast: gain Echo (+20/40% damage to next non-Spirit-Barrage cast in 4s).
engineFields: procs[onCast] (EXISTS); BUFF_DEFS.spiritEcho (NEW — consumed on next non-spirit-barrage cast)

nodes.name: Spirit Velocity
nodes.description: +10/20% cast speed on Spirit Barrage.

nodes.name: Volley Conduit
nodes.description: Each living minion adds +1 projectile to Spirit Barrage (in addition to base 3).

nodes.name: Minion Mastery Support
nodes.description: +15/30% minion damage.

nodes.name: Spirit Cannon
nodes.description: Spirit Barrage projectiles split on hit, hitting 1 adjacent enemy at 50% damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.spiritBarrageSplit (NEW — staff.ts postCast: per hit, emit 1 extra damage event to nearest pack neighbor at hit * percent/100)

nodes.name: Phantasmal Strike
nodes.description: When Spirit Barrage consumes Haunted, also summon 1 fetish minion (5s).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.spiritBarrageConsumeSummonsFetish (NEW — staff.ts preRoll for staff_spirit_barrage: when haunted comboState consumed, call summonMinions('fetish', 1, durationOverride))

nodes.name: Mass Volley
nodes.description: While 5+ minions are alive, Spirit Barrage gains an additional +3 projectiles.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.spiritBarrageMassVolley (NEW — staff.ts preRoll: if minionCount >= minMinions, hitCount += extraProjectiles)

nodes.name: GHOST CHORUS
nodes.description: Each Spirit Barrage projectile spawns a 1.5s ghost minion at impact (deals 25% spell power per attack). Cost: −40% Spirit Barrage damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.spiritBarragePerHitSpawnsGhost (NEW — staff.ts postCast: for each hit, spawn spirit_temp minion with override duration); incDamage (EXISTS)

branches.theme: Spirit Barrage as the burst king. Soul stacks empower volleys; crits cascade through the wave.

nodes.name: Per-Projectile Power
nodes.description: Each Spirit Barrage projectile after the first deals +10/20% damage.
engineFields: perProjectileDamageBonus (NEW — numeric; staff.ts postCast for staff_spirit_barrage: per-hit damageMult = base * (1 + (hitIndex - 1) * value/100))

nodes.name: Soul Trigger
nodes.description: Spirit Barrage critical strikes have 50/100% chance to generate 1 soul_stack. ICD 1.5s.

nodes.name: Soul Salvo
nodes.description: Spirit Barrage consumes ALL soul_stacks on cast: each consumed adds +1 projectile.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.spiritBarrageConsumesSoulStacks (NEW — staff.ts preRoll for staff_spirit_barrage: read soul_stack stacks, hitCount += stacks * value, consume comboState)

nodes.name: Soul Bond
nodes.description: +5/10% Spirit Barrage damage per active soul_stack.

nodes.name: Hunter's Eye
nodes.description: Each consecutive Spirit Barrage hit on the same target grants +5/10% crit multiplier (max 5 stacks, resets on target switch).

nodes.name: Hex Strike
nodes.description: On Spirit Barrage hit on a Hexed target: 15/30% chance to refresh Hexed duration to full.
engineFields: procs[onHit] (EXISTS); conditionParam.targetHasDebuff (NEW); rawBehaviors.spiritBarrageRefreshesHexed (NEW — staff.ts proc handler refreshes hexed debuff to full duration)

nodes.name: Spectral Velocity
nodes.description: −15/30% Spirit Barrage cooldown.

nodes.name: Crit Cascade
nodes.description: If any Spirit Barrage projectile crits, all subsequent projectiles in this cast also crit.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.spiritBarrageCritCascade (NEW — staff.ts postCast: track first-crit per cast, force-crit subsequent hits)

nodes.name: Burst Mastery
nodes.description: +20/40% damage to Heavy-tagged skills.

nodes.name: Pinpoint
nodes.description: Spirit Barrage fires only 1 massive projectile (instead of 3) but it always crits.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.spiritBarragePinpointMode (NEW — staff.ts preRoll: hitCount=1, force crit; consider damage scaling so single shot ≈ 3 crits' worth)

nodes.name: Soul Cascade
nodes.description: Each soul_stack consumed by Spirit Barrage adds +20% damage (on top of extra projectile from Soul Salvo). Cost: Spirit Barrage CD +1s.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.spiritBarrageSoulConsumeDamageBonus (NEW — staff.ts preRoll when consuming soul_stack: damageMult *= 1 + stacks * value/100); cooldownIncrease (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Final Volley
nodes.description: The last projectile in each Spirit Barrage cast deals +100% damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.spiritBarrageFinalProjectileBonus (NEW — staff.ts postCast: last hit damageMult *= 1 + value/100)

nodes.name: THE GHOST CANNON
nodes.description: Spirit Barrage fires 1 massive projectile (sums all hit damage). On crit, it chains to 3 enemies. Cost: −25% damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.spiritBarrageSingleShot (NEW — staff.ts preRoll: hitCount=1 with damageMult ≈ baseHitCount×; on crit, emit chainOnCrit damage events to neighbors); incDamage (EXISTS)
